text:
Created attachment 236702
Fix compilation on FreeBSD 12.3 arm64

Should fix compilation errors from pkg-fallout:

http://ampere1.nyi.freebsd.org/data/123arm64-quarterly/6dfbef93f6a5/logs/dps8m-2.0.1.r2.20211124.log

Log as an attachment (because unable to connect to server ATM).

Huge thanks for the excellent and in-deep answer from Jeffrey H. Johnson:

https://gitlab.com/dps8m/dps8m/-/issues/217
